# hello-otel-ecommerce

hello-otel-ecommerce is a mock e-commerce service (product catalog, carts,
checkout with fraud/payment/shipment simulation, orders, inventory) that serves
as the CNCF reference OpenTelemetry implementation in the hello-otel suite. It
exports all three OTel signals — traces, metrics, and logs — over OTLP/HTTP
(default endpoint http://localhost:4318), with business log records correlated
to the active trace. A machine-readable manifest is available at /api/agent.

## Endpoints

- GET  /                    Live observability dashboard
- GET  /health              Health check ({"status":"ok"})
- GET  /api/health          Health check alias
- GET  /api/products        List products (optional ?category=)
- GET  /api/products/{id}   Get a single product
- GET  /api/cart?cartId=    Get a cart
- PUT  /api/cart            Upsert cart item {cartId, productId, quantity}
- POST /api/checkout        Checkout {cartId, customerId}
- GET  /api/orders          List orders (optional ?customerId=)
- POST /api/orders          Create order {customerId, items[]}
- GET  /api/orders/{id}     Get a single order
- GET  /api/inventory       Inventory health report
- GET  /api/metrics         Business metrics snapshot (JSON)
- GET  /api/events          Recent business events (ring buffer, ?limit=)
- GET  /api/traffic         Generate one burst of demo traffic
- GET  /api/agent           JSON agent manifest
- GET  /llms.txt            This file

## OpenTelemetry signals

Traces: auto-instrumented HTTP spans (@opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node)
Logs:   business events (checkout.started, fraud.check, checkout.declined,
        payment.failed, checkout.completed, cart.get, cart.updated,
        orders.list, order.created, products.list, inventory.report)
Metrics (instrument names == /api/metrics JSON keys):
        checkout_attempts_total
        checkout_fraud_declines_total
        payment_failures_total
        cart_updates_total
        orders_created_total
        checkout_value_usd (histogram, USD)

Health path: /health
